name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Agent Studio
labels: bug

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 128]
- Agent Studio version or commit: [e.g. v1.0.0, abc1234]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (error messages, logs, related issues).
